form.formComment: Solid performance when a close second behind Secret Seduction at this track over 1609m in a FMCLCDNW1 on April 1 at $3.70. Then a handy effort when beaten by 6 m finishing second behind Valley Star at this track over 1609m in a FMCLCDNW1 on April 8 at $3.50. Going along well. Top prospects.
